title: Note verbale de retrait de Maurice

pages.text:
"HELSADE IN FRANGE A L'ILE MAGRICI

Raga le 18 AVA. 1990Mor 99

Dooler I.2.1

MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS AND EMIGRATION

MAURITIUS

NO. 126/20(18971)

17th April, 1990

The Ministry of External Affairs and Emigration presents its compliments to the Embassy for France and has the honour to refer to the Convention instituting an Inter- national Sericultural Commission and to advise the Embassy of the following:- In accordance with Article 28 of the said

Convention, the Government of Mauritius hereby notifies the Government of France of its decision to withdraw from the

Convention with immediate effect.

The Ministry of External Affairs and Emicatioą tor france the assurance of its mehost consideration

The Embassy for France 14, Rue St. George

Port Louis.
